scripts.build: esbuild src/mcp/server-entry.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node18 --external:better-sqlite3 --outfile=dist/katana-mcp.mjs --banner:js='import{createRequire as __cr}from "node:module";const require=__cr(import.meta.url);' && mkdir -p dist/migrations && cp src/storage/sqlite/migrations/*.sql dist/migrations/
